_comment: Foundation-only Shadbala configuration, consumed by shadbalaRuleEvaluator.js. Full classical Shadbala = Sthana Bala + Dig Bala + Kaala Bala + Chesta Bala + Naisargika Bala + Drik Bala. This phase implements Sthana Bala (from sign dignity + planetary friendship), Dig Bala, Naisargika Bala, and a simplified Chesta Bala proxy driven by retrograde status. Kaala Bala (time-of-day / lunar-month / hemisphere strength) and Drik Bala (aspectual strength from other planets) require finer-grained ephemeris and aspect data than this engine currently models and are intentionally left out of this foundation phase — see CHANGELOG recommendations for the next phase.
